title: Maximum Square Area by Removing Fences From a Field
titleCn: 移除栅栏得到的正方形田地的最大面积

testcases.input: m = 4, n = 3, hFences = [2,3], vFences = [2] Output: 4 Explanation: Removing the horizontal fence at 2 and the vertical fence at 2 will give a square field of area 4.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: Removing the horizontal fence at 2 and the vertical fence at 2 will give a square field of area 4.

testcases.input: m = 6, n = 7, hFences = [2], vFences = [4] Output: -1 Explanation: It can be proved that there is no way to create a square field by removing fences.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: It can be proved that there is no way to create a square field by removing fences.
